entry.title: Re: What Is Entity Manipulation Language and How to use EML operation during CRUD
entry.content: Thank you, i was looking to understand what EML is and this was informative, thanks again.

entry.title: How to fix the migration object log error Material type & is not defined for task list type & CT761?
entry.content:
I had uploaded the inspection plan for all materials in the Migrate Your Data app and Migration Object 'Inspection plan' but for some materials inspection plan was not uploaded saying that Material type HIBE is not defined for task list type Q.

 

I searched for configuration also,but i can't find anything in node. 

 

What is the configuration activity to maintain assignment or how to avoid getting the error ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to fix the migration object log error Material ty...
entry.content: Please use the Configuration Activity 'Define Material Type Assignments' 102532 and maintain an entry for the material type and task list type required

entry.title: Hi Experts, Has there been any update on transporting bookmarks ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Hi Experts, Has there been any update on transporting bookmarks ?

Any response is much appreciated.

 

Thanks,

Deepak

entry.title: Re: I need to add a date dimension prompt to a universe
entry.content: I would like nothing more than to be able to mark something as the solution and give the kudos to whoever can explain how I can do this. Unfortunately, nothing suggested yet has worked.

entry.title: SAC - how to trigger my input parameter to run the model prompt on that input.
entry.content:
In my SAC story, I am using 5 models from Datasphere. 4 of them have a date prompt and they are linked (all of them use the same format e.g 202410). so when i run the prompt for one model all models run on the same prompt. But the 5th model is using a input parameter for Date.
So when the user selects the Date from the input parameter(month year), i want it to automatically trigger the other 4 models to refresh at that date. How do I do that?

entry.title: Cloud ALM Test Scripts preparation for SAP S/4HANA 2023 HEC version
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We are currently with SAP HEC and using cloud ALM, We are in process of upgrade for which we are trying to leverage Cloud ALM for testing, We would like to know to how to start with preparing the test scripts and use SAP standard test scripts available in Cloud ALM.

Please let us know how we can configure it and how we can create/use available test scripts in CALM.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Cloud ALM Test Scripts preparation for SAP S/4HANA 20...
entry.content:
Hi,

There are various resources and blogs you can check for helpful information on your question.

For example:

First steps to work with SAP Cloud ALM Deployment scenario... blog has links to the various elements in SAP Cloud ALM > Implementation including Test Preparation.

Also, check blogs on the SAP Community as well as help documentation:

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-best-practices-process-content-for-sap-s-4hana-cloud-private-edition-in/ba-p/13568173
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/end-to-end-testing-with-sap-cloud-alm-overview/ba-p/13940483
  • Test Preparation

entry.title: Re: ALE distribution of Cost Center and GL Account Master Data across SAP systems through IDOCs
entry.content: thank you

entry.title: How to select combinable roadmaps
entry.content:
Hi,

My project has S/4 ARIBA and Successfactors. To set up the project in CALM, I am using combinable roadmaps (see below). However I get only the option of Public Cloud and SF in this window and not ARIBA which is available only as a single roadmap. Is there an option to set up ARIBA specific roadmaps in this?

entry.title: Re: Redirect Error when trying to open Enable Now Manager
entry.content:
Hi Emelie,

Hopefully this issue is resolved but if not I suspect that the issue is related to SSO within your organization.  Please ask your IT team to take a look and see if they can identify the issue and if not realize an SAP support ticket using the Component ID KM-SEN-MGR for further help.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Refresh input control when story filter/variable is changed
entry.content:
I have a SAC optimized story with several pages. When i'm changing the story variable/filter on the FilterPanel, the change is not reflected in my input control.

For example if for the current story filter (default model variable) there is no data for the table in page 5, the input control in page 5 will be blank (inactive values). But when I change the story filter to a correct value, data appears in the table, but the input control still shows blank/inactive values.

Is there a way to refresh the input control similar to how the table is being refresh when a filter is changed at story level?

entry.title: Using SuccessFactors OAuth2.0 in SAP ECC system
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am trying to use SuccessFactors OData API to get data into SAP ECC system. I created a RFC destination and with username/password enter prompt I am able to get the data in the ABAP Program. However I want to use OAuth Authentication of SuccessFactors for getting the data. I am trying to follow the below blog information to complete the configuration. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/configuring-oauth-2-0-and-creating-an-abap-program-that-uses-oauth-2-0/ba-p/13470572

Please provide inputs if anyone already completed the setup in their experience. Thank you. Traditionally to get the OAuth2.0 token from SuccessFactors, we need to send the signed XML data to Token Endpoint to be table to get the token but not sure how it works here.

Best Regards

Ramana Reddy

entry.title: Re: I need to add a date dimension prompt to a universe
entry.content: So far, the only way I can get this to run without any errors is to set it as a string instead and write it as @Prompt('DatePrompt','A',,Mono,Free,Not_Persistent,{'1900-01-01'}) then convert the string back to a date after the query runs. If anyone can get it to cast as a date from the SELECT clause that would be nice. But I suppose if it works then it's not ugly >.>

entry.title: Re: Refresh input control when story filter/variable is c...
entry.content:
unfortunately you cannot populate the input controls dynamically.  at this point whatever you set during the design is what will be available. 

you can use dropdowns to populate, but the input controls are not mature enough yet (setSelectedMembers only populates the value from the list of what you predefine)

entry.title: BAPI to create handling units in SAP EWM?
entry.content: Is BAPI_HU_CREATE the correct BAPI to use to create Handling Units in EWM or is it specific to ERP handling units? Is there a BAPI to create HU's specific EWM? We have a custom program using BAPI_HU_CREATE to create HU's FOR EWM inbound delivery, however it appears it's pointing to ERP HU number range config, not config in /SCWM/HUID

entry.title: SAP Cloud Integration - Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
I need to provide a user with a role that will allow them to delete messages from a JMS queue.

Following: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/managing-messages-stored-in-queues

I have assigned this user the role of PI_Administrator but they are still unable to delete a message from a JMS queue.

What role will allow this?

entry.title: Re: SAM4U, SAP's Highly Anticipated Tool for License Adoption and Consumption Clarity
entry.content:
To support businesses in adopting SAP SAM4U more seamlessly, we’ve launched our Accelerator for SAM4U Adoption on the SAP Store. This solution, hosted in Skybuffer Cloud, is designed to streamline and accelerate SAM4U adoption, particularly for those utilizing Private Cloud Enterprise contracts.

We’re also pleased to offer a free demo tier, which can be easily ordered directly from the SAP Store. You can explore it here: Accelerator for SAM4U Adoption – SAP Store.

entry.title: Re: RISE with SAP: Navigating Vulnerability and Patch Management in SAP Enterprise Cloud Services –
entry.content:
Hi,

The text promises a second part to this blog - "The second part of this blog series will focus on Patch management in detail". My customers are interested in the specifics of how SAP responds to infra layer patch requirements.

Thanks,

Guy

entry.title: Re: I need to add a date dimension prompt to a universe
entry.content:
I over complicated it when mentioning the BLX.  Once your parameter is added to your DFX and you export the universe.  You can access it within a report query.

  1. Add a condition setting whatever date that you need to restrict = a prompt.
  2. Click the gear on Prompt Properties and select parameter from universe
  3. Choose your parameter

entry.title: Primeiro Meetup do ano de 2025
entry.content:
Feliz 2025, pessoal!

Já estamos de olho no nosso primeiro evento do ano e queremos ouvir de vocês!

Qual seria o formato ideal?

Um happy hour para relaxar e conectar como no ano passado, ou algo mais focado em trocar ideias sobre SAP?

E o que acham da data e local? Vamos juntos planejar algo incrível! Comentem aqui suas sugestões.

Lembrando que já temos um outro evento marcado: #SITREC2025

entry.title: What table stores starting event of a workflow
entry.content:
Hello,

I need to find the table that stores the name of the starting event for a workflow.  Workflow trace is not an option if you are trying to have me turn on the trace.  

I see the starting event in the workflow diagram so it must be stored somewhere.

 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Installing Composable Storefront for SAP Commerce 2211.20
entry.content:
Hi @Rakesh_kp - For your first question, I think you had issues configuring the credentials necessary to download the Composable Storefront. Check that section in the instructions, and make sure that the S-user you are using does have permissions to download Spartacus.

Regarding your second question, it sounds like you forgot to copy the webApplicationInjector.js file, as described in step 5. Make sure you did that, and try again.

entry.title: Multimodel Scenario without ASR
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am new to the multimodal functionality in S/4HANA 2023. Can I find out whether I can do multimodel in TM without activating ASR? This is because I read from SAP help about new scenarios for Ocean and Air Freight Bookings for Shippers (Outbound). However, these seems to be part of the new S/4HANA 2023 FSP02 and I am not clear what we will be missing if we do not activate ASR. Appreciate some insights into this. Thanks.

Regards

SF

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Campinas 2025
entry.content: Excelente ter esse tipo de evento pelo Brasil!

entry.title: Re: Functional Usage - Value Drivers and Peer Group Comparison

the display in the SAPforMe may be corrupted.(We do not access the new functions mentioned above.
Regards

entry.title: Re: Error: Cannot find module '@sap/hana-client' in CAPM Project
entry.content: @krishna2504  it needed to be added to the package.json of the other applications within the project. It was not explicitly required but after I added it, it worked fine.

entry.title: Re: Error: Cannot find module '@sap/hana-client' in CAPM Project
entry.content: @AnkitVashisht  fyi...

entry.title: Create Subscription Quote Based On a Specific Configuration Date
entry.content:
BRIM Subscription Order via CL_CRM_ISX_PROV_ORDER_API_PRXY => ORDER_CREATE creates the product configuration that is active as of the current system date but the order is required to be created with a specific date ( product configuration have multiple snapshots/instances based on the changes that are performed with different change number associated with an effective date )

There is no provision to pass the effective date to best of understanding. In this scenario, how can we created date driven BRIM subscription order production configuration

SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management, subscription order management

entry.title: How to map hospital equipments in SAP EAM?
entry.content:
#PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM)

 

Hello Experts,

Hospital equipment such as ventilators, X-ray machines, ECG machines, anesthesia machines, and surgical instruments often move between various locations, and this happens frequently. Tracking their movements, recording maintenance costs for each location, and monitoring their utilization would necessitate continuous updates to the master data.

My question is whether there are any existing solutions to manage these hospital equipment in an Enterprise Asset Management (EAM) system. If so, could you please provide a brief explanation of how the master data for hospital equipment can be effectively maintained?

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Embracing Signavio process modeling and SAP Reference Business Architecture content in EARL
entry.content:
Great blog, thanks for sharing insights

Where in Signavio , SAP customers look at SAP Reference Business Architecture (RBA) 

Appreciate your time

Regards

entry.title: Re: Custom Field value is not picked up by SAP21 Customer...
entry.content: Yes. field value is already stored in the database. It looks like the cds entity "C_FinInvoiceHeaderFDP" of the form template specifically the items "I_OperationalAcctgDocItem" does not contain the custom fields unlike cds entity "i_journalentryitem"

Mj

entry.title: Re: Change history for rfc destinations (SM59)

entry.title: Re: How to bulk register multiple records via a custom Web API developed with RAP
entry.content:
Hi All,

Does anyone have any information regarding this case?

entry.title: Re: ABAP Runtime error !!! Timeout error
entry.content:
I also had the same issue and fix using this query.

SELECT DISTINCT
      EKET~EBELN
      MARA~MATNR
      EKET~WEMNG
      EKET~EINDT
         FROM MARA
         INNER JOIN MAKT
         ON MARA~MATNR EQ MAKT~MATNR
*         INNER JOIN MARD
*         ON MARA~MATNR EQ MARD~MATNR
         INNER JOIN MSEG
         ON MARA~MATNR EQ MSEG~MATNR
         INNER JOIN EKPO
         ON MARA~MATNR EQ EKPO~MATNR
         INNER JOIN EKKO
         ON EKPO~EBELN EQ EKKO~EBELN
         INNER JOIN EKET
         ON EKET~EBELN EQ EKKO~EBELN

         into table itab
         WHERE MSEG~BUKRS = ENTITY AND MARA~MATNR LIKE '000000000004%' AND MAKT~MAKTX NOT LIKE '#%' AND EKKO~AEDAT >= '20231001' AND EKPO~LOEKZ NOT IN ('L').
**AND MARD~LABST > 0
*         AND LENGTH(MARA~MATNR) = 8 AND MARA~MATNR LIKE '00000000000%' AND EKKO~AEDAT >= lv_date

entry.title: DataObject Labels of BPMN Diagram
entry.content: The position of data object labels has been changed with the Signavio update, affecting all the BPMN diagrams we have created. Is it possible to revert the labels to their original position through settings or other means?

entry.title: How to use lock objects in Developer Extensibility
entry.content:
Hi Exparts,

I would like to lock a custom table at any time, so I am trying to control it using a lock object, but it is not working.
The technical background is that this is development on S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, so it falls under Developer Extensibility.
Could you give me some advice, such as what to check?

I used the following documents as reference:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6aa39f1ac05441e5a23f484f31e477e7/06d03eda843643b7a64acfb67edf521b.html?locale=en-US

Best Regards,
Megumi Inoue

entry.title: how to implement authentication of rest API
entry.content:
カスタマイズAPIで、Basic認証で実装したいと考えております。


他システムとのデータ連携のために、APIを利用しています。
※ occ apiではなく、新規でカスタマイズで作成したREST APIです。
    このREST APIはCommerce Cloudに実装していて、他のシステムがREST APIを実行してデータを連携します


このAPIではBasic認証でユーザー(権限)の確認をしたいと考えております。


Basic認証の実装方法が分からなかったため、実装方法を教えて頂きたいです。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: how to implement authentication of rest API
entry.content: https://me.sap.com/notes/0003050787

entry.title: Re: Need help! How to set ETag for a PATCH request with O...
entry.content:
Hi Jerry,

Thanks a lot for your reply.

I actually found the solution, it was not about the value of the ETag, but the root cause lie inside the Model Class of the Service Consumption Model.

When I downloaded the OData EDMX file from SAP Business Accelerator Hub and imported it into Eclipse ADT to create Service Consumption Model, there was nothing inside EDMX file related to ETag. Even though there is a field called "LastChangedDateTime" which is intentionally reserved to be used as ETag, but it is not defined explicitly in the EDMX file. As a result, the generated model could not deal with ETag when I was trying to pass it to the API.

Way to solve this, if the EDMX file does not contain any information for ETag handling, I go to Model Class of the Service Consumption Model, add new field to the Entity Structure (in my case is the entity "A_CHANGE_MASTER") with the STRING data type.

    TYPES:
      "! <p class="shorttext synchronized">A_ChangeMasterType</p>
      BEGIN OF tys_a_change_master_type,
*  Other fields go here
*  ...
        "! ETag
        etag TYPE string,
      END OF tys_a_change_master_type,

Then in the defining method, we simply set this new field to be used as ETag.

    lo_primitive_property = lo_entity_type->get_primitive_property( 'ETAG' ).
    lo_primitive_property->set_edm_name( 'ETag' ) ##NO_TEXT.
    lo_primitive_property->set_edm_type( 'String' ) ##NO_TEXT.
    lo_primitive_property->set_max_length( 256 ) ##NUMBER_OK.
    lo_primitive_property->set_is_technical( ).
    lo_primitive_property->use_as_etag( ).

We can achieve the same with the existing field "LastChangedDateTime", just change the data type to STRING and also set it to be used as ETag in the defining method and it can work fine.

Thanks again!

entry.title: SAC and Maintenance Events
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I'm very new to SAP so please excuse me if i've posted this in the wrong area or I use the wrong terminology (my background is SQL and .Net amongst other things).

My company needs me to look into creating a series of dashboards for them using SAC.  The problem I keep facing is locating the pieces of data I require to present on the dashboard.  Two specific examples are:

1. I need to be able to show Maintenance Orders and their Maintenance Event assignment (from Planning Buckets) - we want to ensure compliance.  While I can retrieve the maintenance order and operation details just fine, I have not been able to locate a data source that will give me the Event they have been allocated to.  In the "Find Maintenance Orders and Operations" app that information is readily available.

2. I need to be able to show which Maintenance Orders belong to which Planner Group.  Now while I can get hold of the Planner Group code, I actually want the Planner Group name.  I can't for the life of me identify where I can retrieve this information!

Might anybody be able to point me in the right direction?  I'm going around in circles and it is very trial and error.

We are using the S4 HANA Public Cloud edition.

entry.title: How to setup exchange rate type in BP(Customer)
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I created outgoing invoices processed in foreign currency (HKD) and the system displayed the exchange rate from the exchange rate type "M."

I need the system default exchange rate type to "YTH" when I record AR transactions.

Please suggest.

Best regards,

May

entry.title: 🎉 Exciting News: I’m SAP Certified! 🎉
entry.content:
I’m excited to share that I’ve officially earned my SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition certification! This achievement marks the start of an exciting journey, and I’m looking forward to exploring all the opportunities it brings.

During my time in the Vower Bootcamp, I gained valuable hands-on experience with the SAP Live System, developing skills in system configuration, business process integration, and data migration. The program has equipped me with the tools I need to thrive in the SAP ecosystem, and I’m particularly interested in how SAP solutions drive efficiency and innovation in industries like supply chain and manufacturing. Currently, I’m participating in Vower’s Job Placement Program and can’t wait to kickstart my career in this dynamic field.

A huge thank you to @David_Chaviano or your guidance and support—it’s been instrumental in helping me achieve this milestone. I’m truly grateful for your mentorship! 🙌

Fun fact: I love experimenting with skincare and have a knack for understanding which products work best for different skin types.

Let’s connect and explore opportunities to collaborate. I’m eager to grow, learn, and contribute to the SAP community!

entry.title: Maintain multiple credit limit in single credit segment
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am new to the SAP Credit Management (FIN-FSCM-CR). 

May I know is it possible to set multiple credit limit in single credit segment? I saw one person answer in below post "We can maintain multiple credit limit against credit segment", but I could not find any guide or steps on how to maintain this in BP (UKM000) transaction.

Can someone share the steps to maintain this if possible? Thank you.

 https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/s4-hana-fscm-multiple-credit-limit-for-multiple-credit-segment-per-bp/qaq-p/12137122 

Regards

Zaida

entry.title: Re: BPC 10.1 Embedded - how the new exit for displaying structure members can be used for setting up
entry.content:
Hi Gerd,

Amazing blog!

I have a try and it always work when i initialize the query, but if i try to refresh it again with the updated prompts, it will pop up the following, the object mentioned in the message is the time bucket structure I created for this case, it was certainly not an infoprovider or an infoobject, but I have no clue why this error happened.

Do you have any idea maybe anywhere i did wrong?

 

Best Regards,

Roy

entry.title: Re: How often to update HANA Cockpit?
entry.content: Agree with Prithviraj answer...

entry.title: Re: How often to update HANA Cockpit?
entry.content:
Hello Christopher,

There is no correct or general answer for this from SAP. We regularly update our HANA cockpit to use latest feature but you can consider updating it based on maintenance strategy and according to required feature. SAP released new SAP note which mentioned new feature according to Cockpit version. Please have a look > https://me.sap.com/notes/3544955

entry.title: Re: What is "Date for Free Use" in Batch Management
entry.content:
Hello @SI_y_Ito 

SAP has provided six free date fields in the batch master data for flexible usage, allowing businesses to tailor them to their specific needs.

For instance, in the pharmaceutical industry, these fields can be used to track important dates such as batch stability testing, regulatory audit schedules, or the planned destruction date for unused or unsold batches.

Best Regards

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Re: Issue with Error Message Display in RAP Managed Scena...

entry.title: Inspection Lot XXXX for order XXXX does not have necessary status
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

As per the month end activity we are trying to close the process order for material. While closing one of the orders, we are getting an error as 'Inspection Lot XXXX for order XXXX does not have necessary status', but as per checking we found that the inspection lot is set properly with UD and ICCO status, still the system is not allowing to close the order. Can you pls let me know what is causing to show up this error and what should be the action to resolve this issue. I have attached the snap of inspection lot status.

entry.title: Re: Installing Composable Storefront for SAP Commerce 2211.20
entry.content: HI @PierreB  i have followed the steps correctly. About spartacus version it takes 4.3.8 as default even if I give 2211.29.1 in package.json file and while adding the spartacus package.It seesm version issue of spartacus how do i isntall 2211.29 since am using 2211.29 hybris version..

entry.title: Re: SAP Build App deployment
entry.content:
An Application built with Build Apps is only an HTML5 application; there is no Cloud Foundry app. You can find it under HTML5 Applications in the subaccount. There is nothing to start in Cloud Foundry.  Cloud Foundry is only used as infrastructure to deploy this app, packaged in an mtar, into HTML5 Repository. 

You can also find this application listed in Site Manager (Build Work Zone Site Builder) under Content Explorer/HTML5 Apps.

entry.title: Detect MRP situation app, I cant add new exception scenario apart from CAN and EXC.
entry.content:
While getting the report from the Batch Job run through app - Detect MRP Situations, I cannot add new exception messages apart from CAN ( Cancel process) and EXC (Excess stock).

I looked at creating custom situation handling, but there is no available situation type or situation object related to MRP situations.

Can anyone help to understand if it is possible to create custom handling situation for additional exception messages apart from the standard one SAP provides?

entry.title: Re: HTTP calls to SAP Cloud Integration from API Manageme...
entry.content:
<BasicAuthentication async='false' continueOnError='false' enabled='true' xmlns='http://www.sap.com/apimgmt'>

async was true which resulted in a scenario was API management didnt wait to fetch the password which in turn was pending on key value map lookup. This resulted in generation of a Authorization header like below

Authorization: Basic <base64 Encoded Username>:

password was missing hence SAP CI rejected this in the http level, should have given 401 at least but gave 500 which is misleading. 

anyways log message helped as i could see the authorization header by logging everything.

Changing async to false in BasicAuth policy resolved the issue , Also I removed 10-12 useless headers from the request that API management inserted.

entry.title: Re: How to get excact Budget planning value without excha...
entry.content: The company code assigned to the WBS element will define the Object Currency.  Then when you enter the budget make sure you are entering the values in object currency.  The object currency will automatically be converted to CO Area Currency and saved, but the entered values in the object currency are the "base" values.

entry.title: Re: Am not able to modify loginDisabled attribute for my...
entry.content:
Hi @Indumati_Patil 

What specific issues or errors are you facing? If the Impex script failed in HAC, it should guide you how to resolve the issue/error. 

I tried it on my end, and OOTB it worked fine, unless you implemented some logics like interceptors around the field. 

insert_update Customer;uid[unique=true];loginDisabled[allownull=true];
;zohan@customer.com;true;

entry.title: Re: Local approuter gives cors error while using a deployed service
entry.content: The picture of the error (last one) is from browser, is it not? So, is it not the browser access that is failing with CORS error? What is the URL of this blocked request? It is not the approuter URL, is it?

entry.title: Re: What table stores starting event of a workflow
entry.content: You can check the table SWFDEVTYP for event linkages, and the Tcode SWE2.

entry.title: Re: Irrelevant Ticket Indicator ?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

When ticket set to "Irrelevant" then Classification updated to "3 - Not Relevant" Please find the ref. snapshot below:

entry.title: Re: is it possible to create a dual column bubble chart using viztype as combination
entry.content: What exactly is "it" that you refer to here?

entry.title: Re: Am not able to modify loginDisabled attribute for my...
entry.content:
Hi samuelyang
Am trying to run the below impex. 

insert_update B2BCustomer;uid[unique=true];loginDisabled[allownull=true];
;zohan@customer.com;false;

But the loginDisabled attribute remain unchanged as true. The same will be running as part of hotfolder impl.

entry.title: Re: External Address number for Business Partner
entry.content: none in case of create

entry.title: Re: How to use lock objects in Developer Extensibility
entry.content: where is the place of fail? line 69? And what is your lock object looks like?

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 profit & loss statement has recorded a cost tr...
entry.content: Hi, To access the SAP note, you need to login with Partner S-User ID and password. Also, may be you can check by running the P/L for the specific period range of the JE to confirm, if the difference value relates to the entry identified or it is some other. Check the JE itself whether values appear properly in the rows. Kr, Jitin

entry.title: Re: Local approuter gives cors error while using a deployed service
entry.content: @gregorw My UI is calling the approuter URL which is supposed to call the actual destination.

entry.title: Re: Local approuter gives cors error while using a deployed service
entry.content: @Dinu. Yes the last picture is from browser. the UI is trying to call the metadata of the destination via approuter url. Which gives CORS error, but when the same link is being used directly on browser it works.

entry.title: Re: Application Jobs in On-Premise systems - part1
entry.content: SAP Note 3296779 - Display-only role for application jobs is only valid and relevant for Public Cloud Products, actually it's not suitable for this article.

entry.title: Re: Local approuter gives cors error while using a deployed service
entry.content: CORS errors occur when the app in the browser embeds URLs from other domains. So it is not surprising that the URL ($metadata) does not fail when accessed directly. Is this prefix of this URL ($metadata) same that of the application that fails?

entry.title: SUM Roadmap Error
entry.content:
We are trying to upgrade from S/4HANA 2020 to S/4HANA 2023 and we have completed the SUM Preprocessing phase. However the SUM tool is giving an odd message, "The Roadmap step Preprocessing completed successfully. You can continue with Roadmap step Reset". 

Has anyone experienced this issue? If you can provide some guidance on how to diagnose this, that too will be useful. If pre-processing is successful then the next step should be Execution and not Reset.

entry.title: Re: Local approuter gives cors error while using a deployed service
entry.content: @Dinu The url which gives the error is localhost:5000/{serviceRoute} the one that calls is localhost:4004

entry.title: Apps not available in FRUN launchpad
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

We are newly installing FRUN system. When loading FRUN FLP for the first time, I could not find any of the apps available. 

Could you please let me know what configuration step could be missing. I tried following most of the SAP blogs but could not get into the issue.

FYI, I am following FRUN_Masterguide_403.pdf  for FRUN configuration.

One of the note I found to be related 3368272 - Fiori Launchpad shows no tiles when accessed using protocol HTTP or using protocol HTTPS through SAP Web Dispatcher - SAP for Me,
But I am already using standard logon procedure.

Regards,

Priyanshu

entry.title: Re: Local approuter gives cors error while using a deploy...
entry.content:
This is the issue:

"The url which gives the error is localhost:5000/{serviceRoute} the one that calls is localhost:4004"

Change your UI application to only make requests the same origin as it is served from. Let approuter which serves it route the requests to the correct url/destination.

entry.title: Re: SAC - how to trigger my input parameter to run the mo...
entry.content:
Probably you can try to use setVariableValue API to achieve this. 

https://help.sap.com/doc/1639cb9ccaa54b2592224df577abe822/release/en-US/index.html#DataSource_MsetVariableValue

entry.title: Re: Local approuter gives cors error while using a deploy...
entry.content:
when I try to make request to port 4004 where the main application is running the service request give 404. in approuter I am calling the correct destination which is a deployed service on BTP

"autoService": {
"uri": "http://localhost:5000/v2/odata/v4/automation/",
"type": "OData",
"settings": {
"annotations": [],
"odataVersion": "2.0"
}
}
this is what datasource looks like in manifest

entry.title: In the Activate Exam they ask what is need to estimate the backlog. What is the answer
entry.content: I have searched in all learning material and cannot find the answer

entry.title: Re: How to use lock objects in Developer Extensibility
entry.content:
This does not mean that an error has occurred. If the processing is going well, executing line 78 should not update the data in the target range, but it does. I confirmed this on the Preview screen of the Fiori created with RAP.

Are you referring to the settings of the lock object? I have attached that below. Please let me know again if this is not what you intended.

entry.title: Re: Local approuter gives cors error while using a deploy...
entry.content: You should not add hostname in the uri property of data source. Typical CAP server setup only allows for requests to one (the same) CAP application. If you want to connect to two CAP application you need to access the application using a reverse proxy that will route the requests correctly; either use approuter or use backend proxy in Fiori/UI5 tools.

entry.title: Re: Create Subscription Quote Based On a Specific Configu...
entry.content:
Hi,

With introduction of multi-level AVC with BOM feature in S/4HANA 2023 FPS0, configuration date can be assigned/ updated in the subscription item while creating the subscription order as well as solution quotation. Help documentation provides useful information on the same Multi-Level Configuration of Product Bundles Using Advanced Variant Configuration | SAP Help Portal

In 2023 FPS1 and FPS2, multi-level AVC with BOM are also supported via API and in master agreement. Subscription order: API_SUBSCRIPTIONORDER
Solution Quotation: API_BUS_SOLUTION_QUOTATION_SRV

Regards
Deepak

entry.title: Re: Clear Facts & Classic Story BUG
entry.content: Is it a planning model or analytics model?

entry.title: Re: Local approuter gives cors error while using a deployed service
entry.content: @Dino the localhost:5000 is the url to the local approuter. which I am using to redirect to the deployed link of the CAP service. Even after using approuter I am getting the CORS issue

entry.title: Re: EHS Duplicate Resource Error in Identify Risk app
entry.content:
Dear Ali,

it seems that something went wrong with the risk identification in the first place. In general, the combination of the following attributes must be unique (and is enforced by the system to be unique):

  • Location,
  • Operational Status,
  • Hazard,
  • Job,
  • Chemical (if applicable),
  • Method of Use (if applicable).

Therefore, the identified risk Corrosion (Diethylaluminum Chloride, Welding) violates the above constraint. Normally, it should not have been possible to identify the same risk twice - on the second try, an error message should have been shown.

"Risk with hazard Corrosion already exists"

I'd run the following checks to see what went wrong or to identify the root cause of the issue:

  1. Check if the duplicate is also a duplicate on the database. Please open transaction SE16N, and have a look at the table EHHSSD_RSK_ROOT - put in the filters to search for the Chemical, Method of Use, and Hazard. If this is an actual duplicate - try to reproduce the issue on any other location/job. An error message should show. If this is not a duplicate on a database level - check if there are any enhancements/modifications to the gateway service.
  2. Try to assign the risks to a risk assessment project. From the risk assessment project, you can delete/void one of the identified risks.

With kind regards,

Michael

entry.title: Version Management in PR created from CJ20N Project services
entry.content: I have a doubt in version management. I have a customer, who is creating PR from CJ20N project builder, and the version management is active for the PR, where they want the short text field to be mandatory. AS they are creating THE PR from projects, here there is no field to add the version short text so it is not allowing them to save the PR from CJ20N. Is there any workaround possible other than making the version short text field as a optional entry. Kindly them me with this query.

entry.title: Re: Am not able to modify loginDisabled attribute for my...
entry.content:
Resolved:
I was missing modifier [allownull=true] It worked

entry.title: Approach for Transferring GSTIN from "Search Term 2" to "PAN" Field in Business Partner Creation
entry.content:
What is the best approach to seamlessly copy the GSTIN number, retrieved via an API and stored in the "Search Term 2" field under the "Address" tab during the creation of a Business Partner (BP), to the "PAN" field located in the "Ctry Spec Enh" tab? 

Attaching images for your reference.

entry.title: Re: Not able create instances for SAP Process Integration...
entry.content: Hi @harinidt ,
